w11339ab1c23c15c15c27c23b7.Label.Docs: A name for the parameter group.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c27c23b7.Parameters.Docs: A list of case-sensitive parameter logical IDs to include in the group. Parameters must already be defined in the `Parameters` section of the template. A parameter can be included in only one parameter group.  The console lists the parameters that you don't associate with a parameter group in alphabetical order in the `Other parameters` group.
